Flow.description: DEACTIVATED by (turned off via the sibling FlowDefinition's activeVersionNumber=0 — a Draft status alone does not deactivate the org's active version). This flow used to create the renewal-risk escalation Task, but its "just entered escalation" gate (WasEscalating == false) raced CaseTriggerHandler's same-transaction Escalated_To_Renewal_Queue__c stamp, so the Task was silently skipped. Escalation — the flag stamp, the Renewal_Risk_Raised__e event, AND the escalation Task — now lives entirely in CaseTriggerHandler.escalateRenewalRisk. Retained as an inert stub because the additive deploy pipeline can't delete a flow; remove it in a destructive-changes pass.
Flow.interviewLabel: Case After Save - Renewal Risk Escalation {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Case After Save - Renewal Risk Escalation
